{# Override Material theme header to include documentation switcher This template overrides the Material theme's header.html partial to inject the documentation switcher component after the logo while preserving all existing header functionality. Requirements: 1.1, 1.3 #} {#- Site title -#}
{#- Link to home -#} {% include "partials/logo.html" %} {#- Button to open drawer -#} {#- Header title with integrated documentation switcher -#} {% include "partials/header-switcher.html" %} {#- Color palette toggle -#} {% if config.theme.palette %} {% if not config.theme.palette is mapping %}
{% for option in config.theme.palette %} {% set scheme = option.scheme | d("default", true) %} {% if option.toggle %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% endif %} {#- Site language selector -#} {% if config.extra.alternate %}
{% set icon = config.theme.icon.alternate or "material/translate" %}
    {% for alt in config.extra.alternate %}
  • {{ alt.name }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {#- Repository information -#} {% if config.repo_url %}
{% include "partials/source.html" %}
{% endif %} {#- Button to open search modal -#} {% if "material/search" in config.plugins %} {#- Search interface -#} {% include "partials/search.html" %} {% endif %}
{#- Navigation tabs (collapsing) -#} {% if "navigation.tabs.sticky" in config.theme.features %} {% if "navigation.tabs" in config.theme.features %} {% include "partials/tabs.html" %} {% endif %} {% endif %}
